sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30977" key="ei)kosapla/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκοσα-πλάσιος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristarch.</author> </bibl> Sam.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1767.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:3:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.68</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
